title: lecanthus petelotii var. corniculatus
intro: Lecanthus petelotii var. corniculatus, also known as the 'horned lecanthus,' is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and is part of the Acanthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lecanthus petelotii var. corniculatus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs for its medicinal uses.
